Aavagroup is the holding company for two pioneering forces in the legal industry: Aavagard and Aavalynx. Together, we’re reimagining what’s possible in law: combining elite legal expertise with bold technological innovation to deliver smarter, faster, and more human solutions for clients worldwide.

Aavagard: Elite dispute lawyers

Aavagard is a law firm for those who demand the best. We are a team of elite dispute resolution lawyers, known for delivering bold solutions, faster wins, and better outcomes. With a fresh, people-first approach, Aavagard solves complex disputes while redefining what it means to practise law.

Visit site

Aavalynx: Legal AI platform

Aavalynx is an AI-first legal technology company transforming dispute resolution. Our platform, Sisu by Aavalynx, combines AI with deep legal expertise to streamline workflows, reduce costs, and optimise outcomes in litigation, international arbitration and other high-stakes disputes.

Visit site
“Hugely impressed by Aavalynx's ability to enable a cost-effective, high-quality resolution of our dispute. AI is the future, and Aavalynx is embracing it.”
Legal counsel for executive education group backed by triple-accredited Hult International Business School

“If you face an existential fight with millions to billions hanging in the balance, your lawyer must be your trusted partner rather than a necessary evil. Aavagard is your shining knight in that fight. They really get that a lawyer’s financial incentives need to be aligned with the client’s end goal wherever possible, and work nimbly to map out the strategic road to success. My favourite lawyers – and I have used many. A wholehearted recommendation.”

Client on a multi-million, multi-jurisdictional dispute
